guidance: Feature ONE specific free tool actually published at blackarrow.ltd/tools (a calculator, an audit, an AI builder, or Black Arrow OS — the free pocket CRM). Everything on that page is free value used as a lead magnet. Lead with what the tool tells or gives the owner, cite its stated value where the site shows one, and end with the TOOLS keyword CTA. Rotate through the tools; never feature the same one twice in a row.
evidence_note: Only describe tools/offers actually published on the Black Arrow site.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Offers / Lead Magnets' was the most under-served eligible category (target 22%, recent 17%).
post_rationale: Fills the under-served Offers/Lead Magnets slot with the one published free tool this account hasn't solo-featured yet, using an image promo card since a single clear offer card converts fastest for a straightforward lead-magnet push.

guidance: Honestly handle a common objection or hesitation an owner has about automation/marketing (cost, complexity, 'it feels impersonal'). Build trust. For done-for-you cost objections: never give numbers; the honest answer is that pricing follows a diagnosis meeting.
evidence_note: Transparent and honest; no unsupported guarantees, no done-for-you pricing.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Objection Handling / Audience Nurture' was the most under-served eligible category (target 6%, recent 3%).
post_rationale: Objection Handling is under-served this cycle, and the cost objection has never been tackled honestly on this account; carousels currently win saves/depth for B2B objection content, and this gives owners a real reframe (compare to the cost of slow follow-up, not zero) instead of dodging the pricing question.
